name: getMdFiles
kick: traverses FileNode tree to collect all .md files recursively
guard: None

name: fetchAllMdFiles
kick: multi-platform async file tree scan: browser, local/electron, or cloud API
guard: visited Set prevents infinite directory loop cycles

name: resolveRelativeImagePath
kick: resolves relative markdown image paths to absolute, normalizing backslashes and ../.. segments
guard: handles http/https/data/blob URIs, Windows drive letters, empty src

name: getRelativePath
kick: computes relative path between two files for wiki-style doc links
guard: handles null fromPath, ensures relative result starts with ./ if not absolute

name: MainEditorApp
kick: control tower: orchestrates all global state, layout assembly, Monaco editor, preview, sidebar, menus
guard: TDZ declaration ordering defense, IME composition lock, stale closure ref backups, race condition guards on mount

name: contentRef_sync
kick: keeps contentRef.current in sync with content state for use in closures
guard: prevents stale closure reading old content from ref

name: loadUserProfiles
kick: loads user CSS profiles from platform storage (electronAPI or localStorage) on mount
guard: filters out system profiles from user-stored data, merges legacy format migration

name: previewModeRef_sync
kick: keeps previewModeRef.current in sync with previewMode state
guard: prevents stale ref in event handlers and async callbacks

name: helpContent_forces_preview
kick: forces preview mode when help content is set, disables editor mount
guard: prevents editor content collision with help overlay

name: pageViewInit
kick: restores isPageViewEnabled from localStorage on mount
guard: None
patch: currently disabled (commented setState) per product decision

name: handleTogglePageView
kick: toggles page view mode and persists preference to localStorage
guard: None

name: tabMetadata_sync
kick: syncs tab metadata (fileName, path, node) when current file info changes
guard: None

name: searchOpen_sidebar_behavior
kick: opens sidebar and switches to search tab when global search opens
guard: resets sidebar tab to TOC when search closes (if still on search tab)

name: loadFilesForDocLinkPicker
kick: loads all .md files when doc link picker opens, cleans state on close
guard: resets all heading/file selection state when picker closes

name: initDeviceId
kick: initializes device unique ID from electronAPI, chrome.storage, or localStorage fallback
guard: handles out-of-order environments; generates crypto-random UUID if none exists
patch: chrome.storage.sync used for addon cross-browser syncing

name: loadAndVerifyLicense
kick: loads license key from storage, verifies against Supabase DB, falls back to local trial period
guard: offline grace period via encrypted cache (3 days), 14-day first-run guarantee, SHA-256 anonymous key generation fallback
patch: crypto subtle fallback for anonymous key if DB unavailable

name: supabaseRealtime_license
kick: subscribes to Supabase postgres_changes on license_activations for realtime activation, plus desktop protocol fallback
guard: cleans up channel and listener on unmount; dedupes with device_uuid filter
patch: desktop onLicenseActivated as backup for Electron environments

name: handleSuccessActivation
kick: persists verified license activation to all storage layers after successful payment/activation
guard: atomic setLicenseStatus + platform storage save (electronAPI, chrome.storage, localStorage)

name: toggleMergeNodeSelect
kick: toggles a FileNode in/out of the merge selection list
guard: deduplicates by path or name to avoid double-add

name: handleOpenMergeModal
kick: opens merge modal only when 2+ files are selected
guard: validates minimum selection count (2) before opening modal

name: currentFileNodeRef_sync
kick: syncs currentFileNodeRef for stale closure prevention in handlers
guard: part of WBS CORE-02 state stale closure prevention system

name: currentFileNameRef_sync
kick: syncs currentFileNameRef for stale closure prevention in handlers
guard: part of WBS CORE-02 stale closure prevention

name: workspaceTypeRef_sync
kick: syncs workspaceTypeRef for stale closure prevention in handlers
guard: part of WBS CORE-02 stale closure prevention

name: rootFolderRef_sync
kick: syncs rootFolderRef for stale closure prevention in handlers
guard: part of WBS CORE-02 stale closure prevention

name: tabSizeRef_sync
kick: updates tabSizeRef from active CSS profile tabSize setting
guard: None

name: setPreviewMode
kick: switches preview mode with editor content preservation, css-style welcome tab auto-creation, and help content guard
guard: prevents mode change during css-style lock, forces editor content sync before transition, blocks helpContent override
patch: 100ms debounce drain before mode switch to prevent content loss; isEditorMountedRef atomic control

name: closeTab
kick: closes a tab with unsaved-changes confirmation, model disposal, and css-style mode auto-exit
guard: stopPropagation on event, confirms on modified tabs, disposes Monaco model, switches to next tab or creates empty

name: autoSaveRef_sync
kick: syncs autoSaveRef with autoSave state for stale closure prevention in auto-save logic
guard: part of stale closure prevention system

name: handleCheckboxToggle
kick: syncs preview checkbox click back to editor model line content
guard: guards with window.monaco existence, line bounds check, regex validation

name: updateDecorations
kick: applies inline Monaco decorations for markdown syntax highlighting (headings, bold, italic, strikethrough)
guard: skips if editor/window.monaco unavailable

name: previewWheelSync
kick: forwards mouse wheel events from preview area to editor scroll in split mode
guard: e.preventDefault with passive:false to stop default scroll

name: darkModeDOMClass
kick: toggles 'dark' class on documentElement for Tailwind dark mode
guard: only runs after mounted to avoid SSR mismatch

name: editorSettingsSync
kick: reapplies theme, font size, word wrap when settings or editor mount change
guard: guards on mounted && isEditorReady to prevent race conditions
patch: requestAnimationFrame layout() to fix jank after theme change

name: darkModePaletteSync
kick: auto-switches theme palette when dark mode toggles to maintain visual consistency
guard: checks THEME_MAP to determine if current palette matches dark/light mode

name: profilesSave
kick: persists user CSS profiles to platform storage on every change
guard: filters out system profiles before saving to avoid duplication

name: activeProfileSave
kick: persists active CSS profile ID to localStorage
guard: None

name: electronAPI_listeners
kick: registers Electron main process IPC listeners for file operations and external file open
guard: removes listeners on cleanup, processes pending external file ref
patch: pendingExternalFileRef defers file open until mount completes

name: openExternalFile
kick: opens a file from OS-level double-click or command-line, creating tab with Monaco model
guard: checks existing tabs for dedup, creates Monaco model with change listener, falls back to handleFileOpenByPath

name: welcomeContentLoad
kick: loads welcome content on first mount if no tabs exist and no external file pending
guard: skips if pendingExternalFileRef is set (defer to file open)

name: dynamicTitleBar
kick: updates document.title with current file name for window tab identification
guard: None

name: previewHighlightLine
kick: highlights preview line matching editor's activeLine in split mode
guard: clears all highlights first to avoid duplicate, finds nearest lower data-line for unmatched positions

name: postContentScrollCorrection
kick: syncs preview scroll position to match editor cursor ratio after content change/parsing
guard: computes viewport ratio from editor cursor and applies same ratio to preview scroll
patch: isScrollingRef lock prevents scroll loop; requestAnimationFrame for timing accuracy

name: handleMouseMove
kick: handles sidebar resize drag mousemove event
guard: clamps width between 150-600px

name: stopResizing
kick: ends sidebar resize: removes listeners, restores cursor and user-select
guard: None

name: startResizing
kick: initiates sidebar resize: adds listeners, sets col-resize cursor
guard: None

name: saveStatusSync
kick: compares content vs lastSavedContent to update save status and tab isModified flag
guard: only runs when currentFileNode exists (not for new unsaved files)

name: autoSave
kick: auto-saves file after 5-second debounce when content changes and autoSave is enabled
guard: skips if content is empty, preview mode is changing, or content unchanged; 5s debounce cleanup

name: insertAtCursor
kick: delegates text insertion at cursor to utilsEditorActions
guard: None

name: findLineNumberByHeading
kick: delegates heading line search to utilsEditorActions
guard: None

name: scrollToLine
kick: delegates editor scroll-to-line to utilsEditorActions
guard: None

name: handlePreviewClick
kick: on preview click: scrolls editor to matching line, highlights line in preview
guard: traverses DOM closest [data-line] to handle nested elements

name: insertBlockTag
kick: delegates block tag wrapping to utilsEditorActions
guard: None

name: wrapSelection
kick: delegates selection wrap/unwrap to utilsEditorActions
guard: None

name: insertLink
kick: inserts markdown link at cursor, auto-selects URL placeholder text
guard: uses lastSelectionRef if current selection is empty; handles both selected-text and empty cases

name: insertTagLink
kick: opens tag link picker for heading-based internal document anchors
guard: None

name: handleTagLinkSelect
kick: inserts [[#heading|text]] tag link at cursor after heading selection
guard: falls back to lastSelectionRef if current selection empty

name: readFileText
kick: reads file content from browser FileSystemHandle, local electronAPI, VFS, or cloud API
guard: determines active mode based on path/handle presence; catches errors gracefully

name: extractHeadings
kick: parses markdown text to extract heading text lines (H1-H6)
guard: removes trailing # characters from heading text

name: handleDocFileClick
kick: loads headings from a selected document file for doc link picker
guard: sets loading state, clears headings on error

name: handleDocLinkSelect
kick: inserts [[relativePath#heading|text]] cross-document link at cursor
guard: resets all picker state on completion; falls back to lastSelectionRef

name: parseHtmlTableToMarkdown
kick: delegates HTML table to markdown conversion to paste handlers
guard: None

name: sanitizePastedText
kick: delegates paste text sanitization to paste handlers
guard: None

name: fixMarkdownTable
kick: delegates markdown table fix to paste handlers
guard: None

name: handleEditorPaste
kick: handles paste event: image upload, HTML table conversion, text sanitization
guard: prevents default on image pastes, tries HTML table before plain text fallback

name: applyLinePrefix
kick: applies ordered list / bullet / quote / checklist prefix to selected lines
guard: calculates continuing ordered number from previous non-empty lines (max 10 back); handles nested quotes
patch: forceTokenization after edits to trigger syntax highlight refresh

name: removePrefix
kick: removes markdown formatting tags from selection: bold, italic, strikethrough, code, links, headings, lists
guard: handles empty selection by expanding to full line; regex-based cleaning preserves leading whitespace
patch: forceTokenization after edits to trigger syntax highlight refresh

name: processedContent_lineMap
kick: preprocesses markdown content for preview and generates line mapping for scroll sync
guard: None

name: dynamicCssString
kick: generates dynamic CSS from active CSS profile including typography, code blocks, tables, checkboxes, HR, dark mode overrides
guard: returns empty string for default profile; dark mode overrides for blockquote, hr, color; skips font-size on h2-h6 (auto-calculated)
patch: codeBlock nested border/background transparent override to prevent box-inside-box artifact

name: quickWrap
kick: quickly wraps selection or current line with heading/quote/code formatting
guard: auto-selects entire line if no selection; Monaco guard checks

name: dispatchCommand
kick: unified command dispatcher routing EditorCommandType to handler methods with editor.focus guard
guard: editor.focus() at entry to prevent browser focus loss; 50ms async forceTokenization after modal commands
patch: 50ms setTimeout for tokenization + layout to fix character overlap (WBS SYNC-02)

name: mapIdToCommandType
kick: maps toolbar item camelCase IDs to EditorCommandType UPPER_SNAKE_CASE with explicit override table
guard: explicit map for mismatched IDs (divider→HR, clear→REMOVE_PREFIX, calendar→NOW); auto UPPER_SNAKE fallback

name: hotkeyRegistration
kick: registers Monaco editor actions for all TOOLBAR_ITEMS with custom hotkeys including Ctrl+S/Ctrl+Shift+S
guard: disposes previous disposables on rerun; parses keybinding strings to Monaco KeyMod/KeyCode

name: globalKeydownHandler
kick: global keyboard shortcut handler: blocks browser defaults for S/O, handles Escape for floating toolbar/tag picker, routes custom shortcuts
guard: capture-phase listener; ignores events from form elements outside Monaco; IME 229 keyCode recovery; global-only shortcut detection before editor focus check
patch: Ctrl+S/O browser default preventDefault for save/open dialogs; keyCode 229 IME composition recovery for Korean input

name: toc
kick: generates table of contents from markdown headings, skipping code blocks
guard: strips BOM character, detects code block fences to avoid false positives
